'''Jexxels''' were tundra-dwelling, white-furred, [[Color/Legends|red]]-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] [[Feline/Legends|felines]]. They had serrated front claws and a mouthful of razor-sharp [[Tooth/Legends|fangs]]. Their eyes glowed in the dark and gave them excellent night-vision.

They were vicious predators that were very territorial and aggressive. They hunted in packs of five, and would attack anything they came across.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-05-12 -->''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
